items.name: OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

items.name: codebase-memory-mcp
items.description: High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

items.name: no-mistakes
items.description: git push no-mistakes

items.name: design.md
items.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

items.name: daily_stock_analysis
items.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

items.name: penpot
items.description: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

items.name: Agent-Reach
items.description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

items.name: hiring-agent
items.description: AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.

items.name: ai-website-cloner-template
items.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

items.name: voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

items.name: orca
items.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

items.name: agent-native
items.description: A framework for building agent-native applications.

items.name: Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
items.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

items.name: worldmonitor
items.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

items.name: system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

items.name: simplex-chat
items.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

items.name: agent-toolkit-for-aws
items.description: Official, AWS-supported MCP servers, skills, and plugins to help AI agents build on AWS

items.name: page-agent
items.description: JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

items.name: deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

items.name: Stirling-PDF
items.description: #1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

items.name: cognee
items.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
